Few characters
Fewer settings
Take place over a shorter period of time
Don’t involve complex processes
Don’t involve content or processes unfamiliar to most
Choose the first personal story you want to tell. This will be the story that you will
work on throughout this module. I suggest by starting with a simpler story to craft.
Think about stories that have:
Perhaps you can choose a story found in your Homework For Life or one of the
exercises from Module #2. Or ask yourself:
What story have you always wanted to tell?
What story do you’ve told before that you’d like to tell better?
What story does your partner, parent, or best friend think you should tell?
